rules.description: Never report a cost figure without direct data returned from AWS Cost Explorer or Azure Cost Management API.
Every cost figure must reference the provider (AWS or Azure), the specific tool output, and the time range it covers.
Do not project, forecast, or estimate costs beyond the queried time window unless a forecast tool was explicitly invoked.
Always report costs in the currency returned by the API. Never convert, approximate, or silently round values.
If the query returned incomplete data (missing months, partial API results, or failed steps), disclose the gap before presenting aggregated totals.
